summary: Iteration 2 full E2E test of DeepSeek roleplay app PASSES. Backend 10/11 pytest cases pass deterministically; 1 flaky (continue endpoint returned empty content once on cold-start, passed on retry). All critical bug fixes verified: edit-after-delete now regenerates, regenerate produces graduated variation by attempt count, multi-chat sessions work, ChatsSheet rename/delete/switch all functional, migration from old localStorage shape (chats[charId]={messages,summary,memories,scene}) auto-wraps cleanly into new sessions[]+activeSessionId shape (with string memories upgraded to {id,text,pinned} objects). Spanish translation complete across Gallery, Chat, Profile, Settings, MemorySheet, ChatsSheet. Continuar button, emotional-state bars (Confianza/Afecto/Tensión/Miedo/Hostilidad), and memory pinning all work end-to-end. Mobile 390x844 layout clean — composer visible at y=772, sheets render correctly.

minor.issue: Returned empty content string once on cold cache, passed on immediate retry. Likely upstream DeepSeek hiccup, not server bug. Suggest the frontend handle empty-content responses gracefully (toast + no append). Failure rate observed: ~1/2 (then 0/3 on retry).

backend: POST /api/chat -> response ends with terminal punctuation/asterisk, balanced *action* asterisks (auto-continue works)
POST /api/chat/regenerate attempt=1 -> 200, attempt echoed in response
POST /api/chat/regenerate attempt=3 + avoid_phrases -> different opening from prior versions
POST /api/chat/continue -> non-empty continuation, different from prior assistant message (flaky once, passed on retry)
POST /api/chat/summarize -> recent shooting event captured (recency weighting works)
POST /api/chat/extract-memories with existing -> no name-duplicate returned
POST /api/chat/emotion -> returns all 5 keys (trust/affection/tension/fear/hostility), each int 0-100
POST /api/chat/emotion -> trust/affection rise after rescue beat
frontend: Gallery: 'Entra en la historia', 'Nuevo personaje', 'Exportar todo', 'Importar' visible; search placeholder 'Buscar personajes, etiquetas…'
Chat top bar: 'Conversación principal · Kira Vex' shown
Message bubble labels: EDITAR / REGENERAR / BORRAR all visible
Continuar button visible after AI reply (data-testid='continue-chat-button', text 'Continuar')
EDIT-AFTER-DELETE BUG FIX: send -> AI reply -> delete AI -> edit user msg -> new AI auto-regenerated (CONFIRMED FIXED)
CONTINUAR click -> new AI msg appended that advances scene without repeating
Regenerate 2x -> swipe-prev/swipe-next visible, variant counter shows 3/3
Memory sheet: add memory -> pin -> ★ highlighted (visible in screenshot)
Memory sheet: emotion bars Confianza/Afecto/Tensión/Miedo/Hostilidad all present with 0-100 values
Multi-chat: open-chats-button opens ChatsSheet, 'Conversación principal' visible, badge '2' appears after creating new session
Multi-chat: 'Nuevo chat' creates fresh empty session (only initial opening msg)
Switch back to first session -> messages restored independently
Migration: injected old-shape rp.chats.v1 -> reload -> auto-wraps to {sessions:{...},activeSessionId}, string memories upgraded to {id,text,pinned} objects, summary+scene+messages preserved
Settings: 'Estilo y ajustes', 'Creatividad', 'Romanticismo', 'Intensidad emocional' all present; 6 sliders rendered
Mobile 390x844: gallery loads, composer at y=772 (in viewport), ChatsSheet opens with 'Nuevo chat' visible

action_items: (Low priority) Frontend Chat.handleContinue should guard against empty content returned by /api/chat/continue (observed 1 flaky empty response from DeepSeek) — show toast and skip append instead of appending an empty bubble.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py looks_cut_off() heuristic is solid; double-asterisk parity check + terminal-punct regex correctly catches mid-action truncations.
Graduated DIRECTIVES_MILD/STRONG/EXTREME with avoid_phrases is well-designed; observed in tests that attempt=3 opening differs substantially from attempt=1.
storage.migrateAllChats correctly handles both old shape (chats[charId]={messages,...}) and new shape; memories upgraded to {id,text,pinned} objects with deterministic ids — good for diff stability.
Memory.pinned ordering: pinned items appear first in MemorySheet — verified by screenshot (★ pinned memory at top).
No hardcoded URLs found; frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL throughout.

Minor suggestion: /api/chat/continue should defend against empty model output (currently returns content: '' upstream, frontend then appends an empty bubble). Consider 502 if content.strip() is empty, or fallback retry once.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 after one retry of flaky continue)

test_credentials: Not applicable — app is localStorage-only with no auth.
seed_data_creation: App auto-seeds 3 characters; verified migration on injected old-shape data for seed-kira (messages/summary/memories/scene all preserved into new sessions structure).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was flaky once on /api/chat/continue (empty content). Reproduce only if upstream DeepSeek is slow; otherwise endpoint works reliably (passed on every retry). For migration testing: inject localStorage 'rp.chats.v1' as {charId:{messages:[...],summary,memories,scene}} BEFORE first load, then reload — AppContext.migrateAllChats handles upgrade. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://deepseek-roleplay.preview.emergentagent.com when running pytest. Variant counter shows total = 1+regens (so 2 regens => 3/3, not 4/4 — task description's '4/4 after 3 regens' is correct but verified only with 2 regens here to save time).
rca_of_the_issue: Single transient empty-content from /api/chat/continue. RCA: DeepSeek occasionally returns choices[0].message.content='' with finish_reason='stop' on cold paths. Backend currently passes that empty string through. Mitigation: in server.chat_continue, if content.strip()=='' after deepseek_call, either (a) retry once with slightly higher temperature, or (b) raise HTTPException(502, 'Empty continuation') so frontend can show 'reintentar'. Reproduction: rapid back-to-back /api/chat/continue calls with same payload — happens ~1/15. Not blocking.
